---
title: "Resources"
---

This page contains books and teaching material that are freely available for educational use.

# Books

- 📘 **Fundamentos de Técnicas Cuantitativas** (Available as free [PDF](files/Libro-FTC-SegundaEdicion.pdf))

### Suggested citation

Martínez, A. M. (2019). *Fundamentos de Técnicas Cuantitativas*. Ituzaingó. ISBN 978-987-86-3052-6.

# Lecture Notes

- 📄 **Real Analysis** (in Spanish) ([PDF](files/Apunte-AnalisisReal-2024-1.pdf))

- 📄 **Linear Algebra** *(coming soon)*

---

These materials are freely available for educational purposes. Please cite the original work if you use or distribute them.
